prompt: An AI support agent for our B2B SaaS customer portal: answer product questions from our docs and KB, look up order and subscription status, create and update tickets, escalate when unsure.
answers: 8000 business customers, 450 tickets/day, tier-gated KB, per-tenant order data, PII in past tickets, 0.15 USD/conversation ceiling, SOC2+GDPR, ticket writes autonomous but no billing.

prompt: An internal document assistant for a 900-lawyer firm: answer questions across matter files with citations. Strict ethical walls between matters are non-negotiable.
answers: 40M documents, per-matter ACLs that change daily, read-only, zero confidentiality breaches, ABA 1.6 + GDPR, 25k USD/month.

prompt: An autonomous coding system for a 2000-engineer company: turn a ticket into a tested pull request, respond to review comments, know when to hand back.
answers: 600 eligible tickets/week, monorepo 30M LOC, never merges, sandboxed, no prod creds, 20 USD/ticket, SOC2, code exfiltration is the chief concern.

prompt: A recipe app feature: a user types what is in their fridge and the app suggests a few recipes and builds a shopping list for missing items.
answers: Seed-stage consumer app, 20k MAU, 3-person team, existing 12k structured recipe catalog, diet and allergy in profile, budget-conscious, no compliance regime.

prompt: Route incoming invoices to the right approver based on amount, vendor, and department rules.
answers: Fields are already structured (amount, vendor id, department). Rules are known and stable. About 2000 invoices/day.

prompt: Summarize a meeting transcript into decisions and action items for our multi-tenant SaaS.
answers: Transcript is provided as input. Multi-tenant, strict isolation between customers. ~5000 summaries/day.

prompt: An internal assistant that answers employee questions about HR policy.
answers: Policy docs change quarterly, some regional and role-gated. 10k employees, SSO.

prompt: A copilot that answers business questions by querying our data warehouse.
answers: Read-only analytics on a governed warehouse, known schema, internal analysts.

prompt: A consumer app feature where users describe symptoms and get guidance on what to do.
answers: Small consumer health startup, low traffic, no clinical partnership yet.

prompt: A voice agent that takes drive-through food orders.
answers: Quick-service restaurant, noisy environment, orders go to the POS, human staff nearby.

prompt: An agent that assesses vehicle damage from a photo a customer uploads and drafts a claim.
answers: Auto insurer, customer uploads photos, a human adjuster approves payouts.

prompt: An agent that triages inbound sales leads: enrich from CRM, score, and draft a reply for a rep to approve.
answers: 300 leads/day, CRM has the data, reps approve every send.
